decisions: Use bcrypt with salt rounds 12 for password hashing
JWT refresh tokens expire in 7 days
Never store tokens in localStorage, use httpOnly cookies
Soft delete users, never hard delete
Use react-force-graph for all graph visualizations
Dashboard must load under 2 seconds on mobile
Always verify Razorpay webhook signature before processing
Avoid mutex for shared state, use message queues instead
Log every payment event for audit trail
All services must have health check endpoints
Use Kubernetes rolling updates, never recreate
All new APIs must follow GraphQL schema conventions
WebSocket connections must reconnect automatically on drop
